title: LavaWaterOrest
description: Lava + Water generates stone or ores with configurable chances.
body:
🎉 Initial release of LavaWaterOrest

Features:
- Lava + Water generates Stone or Ores instead of Cobblestone
- Configurable chances for:
  - Coal Ore
  - Iron Ore
  - Lapis Ore
  - Redstone Ore
  - Diamond Ore
  - Nether Quartz Ore
- Detects Cobblestone generators correctly
- Optional: only affect Cobble generators
- Supports Deepslate ores below Y=0
- Works in Singleplayer and Multiplayer
- Server-side safe (no client exploits)

Minecraft versions:
- 1.21.10
- 1.21.11

Loader:
- Fabric
- Need Fabric API
